messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0013",
  "title": "海外移动游戏收入TOP榜",
  "page_index": 16,
  "page_range": "16-17"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0014",
    "title": "TOP榜产品《皇室战争》《奔奔王国》深度解析",
    "page_range": "17-18",
    "summary": "Topics: Mobile game market analysis, legacy game revitalization strategies, new product market entry, gameplay & monetization design, user acquisition marketing.\nEntities: Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), 《荒野乱斗》(Brawl Stars), 《Whiteout Survival》.\nDates: 2023–2025 (annual revenue tracking), March–December 2025 (monthly revenue tracking), 2025 (Kingshot launch/listing year).\nDefinitions/Concepts: “系统性重生” (Systematic rebirth via gameplay & economy overhaul), “合成奇兵” (Auto-chess synthesis strategy mode), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (Validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (Saturated marketing strategy focusing on secondary gameplay), “塔防” (Tower defense as low-barrier onboarding).\nProcedures/Strategies: \n- Clash Royale Revival: Increased trophy road limits, introduced high-tier progression modes, launched auto-chess synthesis mode, decentralized premium rewards to mid-tier players to boost engagement and spending.\n- Kingshot Launch: Adapted proven Sim+4X SLG framework, integrated lightweight tower defense for early-game onboarding, selected complementary medieval theme/art style, executed high-frequency ad campaigns highlighting tower defense gameplay for cold-start user acquisition.\nClaims: Legacy game revival relies on deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction; new product breakthroughs depend on micro-innovation within mature models. Supercell demonstrates strong operational capability through legacy game revitalization. Kingshot is the sole new product on the 2025 TOP list.\nFigures & Metrics: \n- Chart 1: 2023–2025 overseas revenue scale for Clash Royale (unit: 亿元).\n- Chart 2: 2025 monthly overseas revenue scale for Kingshot (unit: 亿元), covering March–December, featuring a highlighted 94.8% metric.\nEvidence Types: Proprietary industry research data,..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0015",
    "title": "海外移动游戏2025年新品收入TOP榜",
    "page_range": "18-19",
    "summary": "**Topics:** 2025 overseas mobile game new release revenue rankings, market development trends, IP utilization vs. original IP creation, commercial framework reuse, user acquisition cost impact, long-term operation market dynamics.\n**Entities:** Top 16 revenue-generating new games (《奔奔王国》《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》《枫之谷：放置冒险记》《Disney Solitaire》《I9》《洛奇M》《吸血鬼》《RF ONLINE NEXT》《可狱不可囚》《暗影诗章：凌越世界》《杖剑传说》《赛马娘》《DC: Dark Legion》); publishers/developers (点点互动, 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, SuperPlay, 乐牛游戏, 益世界, CyGames, 雷霆游戏, FunPlus); data provider (点点数据).\n**Dates:** 2024 (baseline comparison year), 2025 (primary analysis period), 2026 (report copyright year).\n**Claims/Insights:** 2025 lacks major original AAA releases; top revenue is dominated by classic IP adaptations/reboots and titles that precisely reuse proven commercial frameworks; \"IP nostalgia\" and \"micro-innovations on validated models\" are core assets to hedge against market uncertainty and high user acquisition costs; new releases are expected to efficiently capture existing IP fanbases rather than pioneer new gameplay paradigms.\n**Metrics:** Annual revenue (流水) in RMB (亿元) for each of the top 16 ranked games, ranging from 42.26亿元 (#1) to 6.04亿元 (#16).\n**Evidence/Format:** Ranked list/table of top-grossing overseas mobile game new releases for 2025, detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher; analytical commentary on market convergence; sourced from 点点数据 proprietary research. No procedural steps or formal definitions are included."
  }
]

message.content: This section (pp. 16–17) analyzes the overseas mobile game revenue TOP rankings, focusing on legacy title revitalization and 2025 new release market performance. **Topics:** Mobile game market analysis, legacy game revitalization strategies, new product market entry, gameplay & monetization design, user acquisition (UA) marketing, IP utilization vs. original creation, commercial framework reuse, and long-term operational dynamics. **Entities:** Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, and data provider 点点数据. Featured titles include 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), 《荒野乱斗》, 《Whiteout Survival》, and the top 16 revenue-generating new releases of 2025 (e.g., 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》《枫之谷：放置冒险记》). **Dates:** 2023–2025 (annual revenue tracking), March–December 2025 (monthly tracking), 2024 (baseline comparison), and 2026 (report copyright). **Tables & Figures:** Chart 1 (2023–2025 overseas revenue scale for Clash Royale in 亿元), Chart 2 (2025 monthly overseas revenue for Kingshot in 亿元, highlighting a 94.8% metric), and a ranked table of the top 16 overseas mobile game new releases for 2025 (detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher). **Definitions/Concepts:** “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “合成奇兵” (auto-chess synthesis mode), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (saturated secondary-gameplay UA strategy), and “塔防” (tower defense for low-barrier onboarding). **Procedures/Strategies:** Clash Royale’s revival tactics include increasing trophy road limits, introducing high-tier progression modes, launching auto-chess synthesis, and decentralizing premium rewards to mid-tier players. Kingshot’s launch strategy adapts a Sim+4X SLG framework, integrates lightweight tower defense for early-game onboarding, and executes high-frequency ad campaigns for cold-start UA. **Claims:** Legacy game revival requires deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction, while new product breakthroughs depend on micro-innovation within mature models. The 2025 market lacks major original AAA releases, with top revenue dominated by classic IP adaptations and proven commercial frameworks. “IP nostalgia” and framework reuse serve as core hedges against market uncertainty and high UA costs. Supercell demonstrates strong operational capability, and Kingshot is the sole new product on the 2025 overall TOP list. **Metrics:** Annual revenue (流水) in RMB (亿元) for tracked titles, with the top 16 new releases ranging from 42.26亿元 (#1) to 6.04亿元 (#16). **Evidence Types:** Proprietary industry research data, ranked revenue tables, and analytical market commentary sourced from 点点数据.

     - Dates: 2023–2025 (annual), Mar–Dec 2025 (monthly), 2025 (Kingshot launch).

     - Procedures/Strategies: Clash Royale revival tactics (trophy limits, progression modes, auto-chess, reward decentralization); Kingshot launch strategy (Sim+4X framework, tower defense onboarding, medieval theme, high-frequency ad campaigns).
     - Claims: Legacy revival needs deep reconstruction; new breakthroughs rely on micro-innovation in mature models; Supercell shows strong ops capability; Kingshot is the only new product on the 2025 TOP list.
     - Figures & Metrics: Chart 1 (2023-2025 CR revenue in 亿元), Chart 2 (2025 monthly Kingshot revenue in 亿元, Mar-Dec, highlights 94.8%).

     - Dates: 2024 (baseline), 2025 (analysis), 2026 (copyright).
     - Claims/Insights: 2025 lacks major original AAA; top revenue dominated by classic IP adaptations/reboots & proven framework reuse; "IP nostalgia" & "micro-innovations" hedge against uncertainty/high UA costs; new releases target existing IP fans rather than pioneering new paradigms.
     - Metrics: Annual revenue (流水) in RMB (亿元) for top 16 games, range 42.26B to 6.04B.

3.  **Synthesize for Parent Section (0013: 海外移动游戏收入TOP榜):**

     **Topics:** Mobile game market analysis, legacy title revitalization, new product market entry, gameplay/monetization design, user acquisition (UA) marketing, IP utilization vs. original creation, commercial framework reuse, and long-term operational dynamics.
     **Entities:** Key developers/publishers include Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, and others. Featured titles include 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), 《荒野乱斗》, 《Whiteout Survival》, and the top 16 revenue-generating new releases of 2025 (e.g., 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》). Data is sourced from 点点数据.

     **Tables & Figures:** Includes Chart 1 (2023–2025 overseas revenue scale for Clash Royale in 亿元), Chart 2 (2025 monthly overseas revenue for Kingshot in 亿元, highlighting a 94.8% metric), and a ranked table of the top 16 overseas mobile game new releases for 2025 (detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher).
     **Definitions/Concepts:** “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “合成奇兵” (auto-chess synthesis mode), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (saturated secondary-gameplay UA strategy), and “塔防” (tower defense for low-barrier onboarding).

   This section (pp. 16–17) analyzes the overseas mobile game revenue TOP rankings, focusing on legacy title revitalization and 2025 new release market performance. **Topics:** Mobile game market analysis, legacy game revitalization strategies, new product market entry, gameplay & monetization design, user acquisition (UA) marketing, IP utilization vs. original creation, commercial framework reuse, and long-term operational dynamics. **Entities:** Supercell, 点点互动 (DianDian Interactive), 万代南梦宫, 海彼游戏, 网石游戏, NEXON, CyGames, FunPlus, and data provider 点点数据. Featured titles include 《皇室战争》(Clash Royale), 《奔奔王国》(Kingshot), 《荒野乱斗》, 《Whiteout Survival》, and the top 16 revenue-generating new releases of 2025 (e.g., 《SD钢弹 G世代 永恒》《弓箭传说2》《七骑士 Re:BIRTH》《枫之谷：放置冒险记》). **Dates:** 2023–2025 (annual revenue tracking), March–December 2025 (monthly tracking), 2024 (baseline comparison), and 2026 (report copyright). **Tables & Figures:** Chart 1 (2023–2025 overseas revenue scale for Clash Royale in 亿元), Chart 2 (2025 monthly overseas revenue for Kingshot in 亿元, highlighting a 94.8% metric), and a ranked table of the top 16 overseas mobile game new releases for 2025 (detailing rank, title, annual revenue, and publisher). **Definitions/Concepts:** “系统性重生” (systematic rebirth via gameplay/economy overhaul), “合成奇兵” (auto-chess synthesis mode), “模拟经营+4X SLG” (validated core framework), “副玩法买量” (saturated secondary-gameplay UA strategy), and “塔防” (tower defense for low-barrier onboarding). **Procedures/Strategies:** Clash Royale’s revival tactics include increasing trophy road limits, introducing high-tier progression modes, launching auto-chess synthesis, and decentralizing premium rewards to mid-tier players. Kingshot’s launch strategy adapts a Sim+4X SLG framework, integrates lightweight tower defense for early-game onboarding, and executes high-frequency ad campaigns for cold-start UA. **Claims:** Legacy game revival requires deep, risk-tolerant reconstruction, while new product breakthroughs depend on micro-innovation within mature models. The 2025 market lacks major original AAA releases, with top revenue dominated by classic IP adaptations and proven commercial frameworks. “IP nostalgia” and framework reuse serve as core hedges against market uncertainty and high UA costs. Supercell demonstrates strong operational capability, and Kingshot is the sole new product on the 2025 overall TOP list. **Metrics:** Annual revenue (流水) in RMB (亿元) for tracked titles, with the top 16 new releases ranging from 42.26亿元 (#1) to 6.04亿元 (#16). **Evidence Types:** Proprietary industry research data, ranked revenue tables, and analytical market commentary sourced from 点点数据.
